name: Chargebee
description: Subscription billing and revenue management platform for SaaS and recurring revenue businesses serving 4,500+ companies
pros: Founded by Indian engineers from Chennai
Integrates with 30+ payment gateways including Razorpay
cons: Delaware C-Corp with US HQ — not an Indian company legally
Foreign VCs (Tiger Global, Sequoia, Insight Partners) hold majority
Pricing can be expensive for startups beyond free tier
Complex setup for simple billing use cases
userComplaints: Billing discrepancies when switching between plans mid-cycle
Customer support response times have slowed as company scaled
Documentation can be outdated for newer features
